creator: nexther0@gmail.com
text:
The current version of the net/radiator port is set for version 3.17.1 of the radiator software. The most recent version of radiator available is version 4.7. The attached patch updates the port version variable in the Makefile to 4.7 and related values in the distinfo file so that the net/radiator port will install radiator version 4.7.

Fix: See attached patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to use the current net/radiator port to install version 4.7 of the radiator software using the tarball Radiator-4.7.tgz downloaded from the open systems website open.com.au.
